query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%chicote%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as chicote,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%bateria%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bateria,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%mostruario%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%mostruário%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mostruario
FROM products
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%chicote%' 
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%bateria%' 
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%mostruario%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%mostruário%';
